falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases above 50 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 50 would indicate extreme overbought conditions, contradicting the pattern's historical bottom behavior and invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 70%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A drop in similarity below 70% would mean the current market behavior no longer aligns with the historical bottom pattern, rendering the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price breaks below the 2024-Aug bottom's key support level (e.g., $X.XX) by 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A confirmed break below a critical support level from the historical bottom pattern would indicate a potential continuation of the downtrend, invalidating the HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
